惊悚小说不同，并不是完全黑暗的文风，中间穿插很多梗，或者车。总得来说是眼前一亮。但可能正是这种区别，让部分读者接受不了。评论区两极分化。希望作者能火速更新。正所谓一千个读者有一千个哈姆雷特。人人口味不统一。除非是叙述方式很烂或者是文笔很烂。大多数时候不喜欢直接看其他的就行。但是主角智商时高时低这个事情作者还是尽量找个理由或者后续让智商统一。总得来说还是很不错的[吃瓜]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1684955068,"group_id":"7118328256125733923","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"单机日更30000字，不会作诗也会吟","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NxlWRmxQRvgOtebHVRu6iGI=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/cc7ceb2c71174fd0b3f009cc4893f5d9~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776791122&x-signature=fkoyZOOgnoTbfKGtCRRevmsDV%2BM%3D","user_id":"712915192397079","user_name":"重生之我是香肠狗"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"712915192397079","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1735389803,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#E4F5CD","can_worn":false,"id":3,"name":"烂尾督察员","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/972e1bec4437ce8e045aaf8e3bbfe1aa","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/47aabaca7b644a2b0eb9d35477c6d9df"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7118328256125733923","book_info":{"abstract":"当你凝望深渊的时候，深渊也在凝望你！
